/matchdays/[date].reason: Repository contains only 72 group-stage matches (matches 1–72). The full tournament requires 104 matches. The 32 knockout-stage matches (R32 × 16, R16 × 8, QF × 4, SF × 2, 3rd × 1, Final × 1) are absent from lib/matches.ts and cannot be added without verified official fixture data (dates, times, venues, participant slots).
